title: draba verna subsp. majuscula
intro: Draba verna subsp. majuscula, also known as greater whitlow grass or greater draba, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for infections and wounds. The health benefits of Draba verna subsp. majuscula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote healing. Draba verna subsp. majuscula is traditionally used in herbal preparations, often in the form of a tincture or salve, to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
